name: ecatu-ronald-portfolio
description: Ecatu Ronald — Electrical & Automotive Systems Engineer full-stack portfolio

scripts.setup: npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix backend
scripts.build:frontend: npm install --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix frontend
scripts.build:backend: npm install --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix backend
scripts.build:full: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint:backend && npm run lint:frontend
scripts.verify: npm run lint && npm run build:full
